__erase_top__.name: Erase
__erase_top__.description: Tap cells to clear them. You can also clear floor tiles to reveal the abyss.

..name: Floor
..description: Plain ground. Objects can fall off the floor into the abyss.

i.name: Ice
i.description: Slick ground. Players slide across it until something stops them.

#.name: Wall
#.description: Walls are immoveable and block movement. In some situations you may walk on top of walls. Players cannot fall off walls, but players can push boxes off of walls.

I.name: Ice Block
I.description: Ice blocks are immoveable and block movement. Objects can slide on them. Players and boxes can slide off of ice blocks.

Sr.name: Ice Slope
Sr.description: An icy ramp that carries a slide between heights. It faces the camera when placed.

SrO.name: Orange Ice Slope
SrO.description: Raises with the orange walls when no button is pressed; lowers into a climbable ice slope while a button is held.

Sr#.name: Black Ice Slope
Sr#.description: A wall-styled ice slope for decoration. It slides exactly like the regular ice slope.

p.name: Player
p.description: The starting position for this room. Place exactly one.

c0.name: Clone 0
c0.description: Clones copy the player's moves. Clones with the same id are connected

c1.name: Clone 1
c1.description: Clones copy the player's moves. Clones with the same id are connected

c2.name: Clone 2
c2.description: Clones copy the player's moves. Clones with the same id are connected

G.name: Gem
G.description: The collectible that players will try to find.

g.name: Player Gate
g.description: The gate stays down until the player gets within one unit of it. It lets everything pass except the player.

l.name: Lowered Lift
l.description: When a player stands on a lowered lift, it raises the player up one unit.

L.name: Raised Lift
L.description: When a player stands on a raised lift, it lowers the player down one unit.

O.name: Orange Wall
O.description: A wall that drops and rises whenever an orange button is pressed and released.

o.name: Orange Button
o.description: A pressure button that toggles down every orange wall in the room. When multiple orange buttons reside in a level, all must be pressed at the same time for them to activate.

pr.name: Puncher
pr.description: Punches whatever stops in front of it, launching the target away as far as possible.

f.name: Floating Floor
f.description: A pushable platform. Shove it into place, then walk or slide across it.

M0.name: Box 0
M0.description: A weightless box that can be pushed by anything. All boxes with the same id are connected and move together. They cannot be pushed out of a room.

M1.name: Box 1
M1.description: A weightless box that can be pushed by anything. All boxes with the same id are connected and move together. They cannot be pushed out of a room.

M2.name: Box 2
M2.description: A weightless box that can be pushed by anything. All boxes with the same id are connected and move together. They cannot be pushed out of a room.

M3.name: Box 3
M3.description: A weightless box that can be pushed by anything. All boxes with the same id are connected and move together. They cannot be pushed out of a room.

M4.name: Box 4
M4.description: A weightless box that can be pushed by anything. All boxes with the same id are connected and move together. They cannot be pushed out of a room.

__box_prompt__.name: Box N
__box_prompt__.description: Pick any box id and paint with it. Boxes sharing an id are connected and move together; the id shows on every piece.

__clone_prompt__.name: Clone N
__clone_prompt__.description: Pick any clone id. Clones copy the player's moves and clones sharing an id are connected; the id shows on every piece.

__blue_slope_prompt__.name: Box Ice Slope N
__blue_slope_prompt__.description: A slope-shaped member of box group N. It slides like an ice slope but moves with its connected boxes. Pick the id, then place it — it faces the camera when placed.

__yellow_slope_prompt__.name: Clone Ice Slope N
__yellow_slope_prompt__.description: A slope-shaped member of clone group N. It slides like an ice slope but moves with its connected clones. Pick the id, then place it — it faces the camera when placed.

t1.name: Tree 1
t1.description: Decorative scenery. Solid like a wall, but nicer to look at.

t2.name: Tree 2
t2.description: Decorative scenery. Solid like a wall, but nicer to look at.

t3.name: Tree 3
t3.description: Decorative scenery. Solid like a wall, but nicer to look at.

t4.name: Tree 4
t4.description: Decorative scenery. Solid like a wall, but nicer to look at.

st1.name: Small Tree 1
st1.description: Compact decorative scenery that behaves like a wall.

st3.name: Small Tree 3
st3.description: Compact decorative scenery that behaves like a wall.

st4.name: Small Tree 4
st4.description: Compact decorative scenery that behaves like a wall.

sh.name: Shrub
sh.description: Decorative shrubbery that behaves like a wall.
